moves.name: PK Thunder
moves.notes: frame data refers to maxmimum time thunder can be active. 54 frames endlag once thunder is gone if it didnt hit ness. if it did, ness hitbox active frames 1-36, 70 total frames, strong hit active frames 1-12.

moves.name: PK Flash
moves.notes: minimum total is 109 frames, maximum is 217. damage increases based on charge time

moves.name: Down Smash
moves.notes: IASA frame is not visualized within animation due to a bug in the game.

moves.name: PSI Magnet
moves.notes: frame data refers to minimum amount of time move can be used. 21 frames of lag upon release, 18 upon absorb

moves.name: PK Flash (Air)
moves.notes: minimum total is 109 frames, maximum is 217. damage increases based on charge time

moves.name: PK Fire (Air)
moves.notes: burning hits last 100 frames, hits do 2% each (no data on how many hits)
